name: Email 1 - Welcome
subject: Your Alignment Snapshot is ready
htmlContent:
Hello {{contact.first_name | default: "there"}},

Welcome. I am so glad you are here.

First, let me say this: it takes real courage to look honestly at one's life. To pause the doing long enough to ask, "How am I really?" — that is not small. That is the faithful step that changes everything.

Your Alignment Snapshot results are attached. As you read through them, know this: whatever pattern emerged, it is not a verdict. It is information. A compass point, not a destination.

You might see yourself clearly in these results. You might feel seen in a way that surprises you. Or you might notice a gap between where you are and where you sense you could be. All of it is welcome here.

The Snapshot gives you a map. But maps do not walk themselves.

When you are ready for the container that holds this work — the weekly practices, the living tools, the community of fellow travelers walking the same road — the LifeCharter Circle is here. No pressure, no rush. Just an open door when the time feels right.

For now, sit with what you have discovered. Let it land. And know that you are not alone on this journey.

Head up, wings out,

Babs
LifeCharter Founder

P.S. — If something in your results sparks a question, just hit reply. I read every email.
